data_warning: Some source state rows are stale; row-level data_quality says whether a symbol is fresh enough for live decision support. This panel is display/research only.
purpose: Find gaps that remain open after four trading sessions and may act as continuation floors/ceilings for the next roughly two weeks.

data_quality.respect_method: inferred from still-open exported gap; candle replay not yet attached

rule.long_read: bullish gap below price stays unfilled for four sessions, then acts as a floor
rule.name: four_session_gap_respect
rule.short_read: bearish gap above price stays unfilled for four sessions, then acts as a ceiling
rule.use: context, target/hold bias, and watchlist research; not a standalone live entry

schema.respected_4d: true when the exported still-open gap is at least four trading sessions old
schema.score: 0-100 research rank from age, timeframe, genesis, volume, distance, and opposite traffic

data_quality.respect_method: inferred from still-open exported gap; candle replay not yet attached
